title: MkDocs
excerpt: description: Deploy an MkDocs documentation site to Cloudflare Pages. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. [MkDocs ↗](https://www.mkdocs.org/) is a modern documentation platform where teams can document products, internal knowledge bases and APIs. MkDocs requires a recent version of Python and the Python package manager, pip, to be installed on your system. To install pip, refer to the [MkDocs Installation guide ↗](https://www.mkdocs.org/user-guide/installation/). With pip installed, run:
